task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into the medical record system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent logged into the EMR/dashboard (using the provided admin credentials).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the correct patient's chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the patient dashboard or chart specifically for 'Arnulfo Kertzmann'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the Vitals encounter for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Vitals form or encounter record open in an editable state.

task_completion.description: Verify the encounter date and time were updated to the target values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the date field changed to '2025-01-15' (or January 15, 2025) and the time field changed to '14:00' (or 2:00 PM) in the encounter/vitals edit form.

task_completion.description: Verify the changes were saved and clinical values were not modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the saved Vitals record displaying the new date/time (2025-01-15 14:00) alongside the original clinical values (height, weight, BP) which must still be present and intact.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the web browser and EMR interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI using direct database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of SQL clients, phpMyAdmin, or terminal windows executing UPDATE statements.

integrity.description: Verify the results are shown in the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final confirmation should be within the EMR system's standard layout, not a text editor or a locally modified HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Arnulfo Kertzmann. Target Date: 2025-01-15. Target Time: 14:00 (2:00 PM). A tolerance of 5 minutes is allowed for the time (e.g., 13:55 to 14:05). The clinical values (height, weight, BP) must remain unmodified.
